issues.description: Text states 'during this turn' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. These are semantically different in OPTCG DSL.
Second effect is completely fabricated. Card text only describes the [Banish] keyword effect. There is no second trigger or KO action in the official text. This effect should be removed entirely.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains [Banish] during this turn.
